getDashboard_5168f207e9.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: Test expected a NullPointerException, but a NumberFormatException was thrown when userId was null.
* Where: AppControllerGetDashboardTest.testGetDashboardThrowsWhenUserIdIsNull (line 120); actual error at AppController.getDashboard (line 45).
* Why: getDashboard attempts to parse a null userId as an integer, causing NumberFormatException instead of NullPointerException.
* Investigate: Review getDashboard to handle null userId input explicitly; update the test to expect NumberFormatException, or refactor input handling to throw the intended exception.,

getTransactiontHistory_29b1ff7483.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
*What Failed*: A unit test expecting a NullPointerException instead received a NumberFormatException.

*Where*: AppControllerGetTransactiontHistoryTest.testThrowsExceptionWhenUserIdIsNull (line 101); root at AppController.getTransactiontHistory (line 85).

*Why*: Passing a null user ID triggers parseInt, causing NumberFormatException ("Cannot parse null string") instead of NullPointerException.

*Investigate*: Update getTransactiontHistory to properly handle null user ID before parsing. Adjust the test to expect NumberFormatException, or change controller logic to throw the expected NullPointerException.,
